app.title: Product Recall Alert
app.subtitle: Check if a product has been recalled
home.hero.title: Has your product been recalled?
home.hero.subtitle: Scan a barcode or upload a photo to check instantly.
home.uploadHint: Drop an image here or click to browse
home.feature.scan.title: Instant scan
home.feature.scan.description: Use your phone camera to scan a product barcode.
home.feature.upload.title: Image upload
home.feature.upload.description: Take a photo of the barcode and upload it from your gallery.
home.feature.search.title: Quick search
home.feature.search.description: Enter a barcode directly in the search bar.
search.title: Search
search.inputPlaceholder: Search for a product, brand, barcode...
search.hint: Enter a term to search for recall alerts.
search.noResults: No results found for this search.
search.resultsCount: {count, plural, one {# result found} other {# results found}}
scanner.title: Barcode scanner
scanner.error: Unable to access the camera. Try uploading an image.
scanner.noCode: No barcode detected in the image.
page.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
page.faq.a1: A product recall is a measure taken when a product poses a risk to consumer health or safety.
page.faq.a2: The data comes from official product recall sources.
page.faq.a3: Yes, the app is completely free.
